prompt: Here's my game on Google Play: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.HonStudios.LuminoriaTactics&hl=en — can you auto-draft a game marketing context doc from this listing? The game is in global launch now.

assertions.text: Game title correctly identified as LUTA: Luminoria Tactics or Luminoria Tactics
Genre classified as mid-core or tactical/strategy with session length benchmark referenced (15–30 min)
Mid-core D1 retention benchmark referenced (25–35%), NOT the casual range (35–45%)
Core loop is written using the action→reward→progression→loop structure, even if speculative and flagged as assumption
ROAS targets include a time window (D7, D30, or D90) — not just 'good ROAS'
iOS measurement section mentions ATT, SKAdNetwork, or the ~25–35% opt-in rate limitation
UA channels do not list IronSource as a standalone network or Vungle (outdated names)
All unknown KPIs are marked [NEEDS INPUT] or [ASSUMPTION] — not fabricated as facts
